assertions.description: The pre-existing overscroll-behavior CSS property is supported, the foundation overscroll gestures builds on.
overscroll-behavior-x is supported for axis-specific overscroll handling.
overscroll-behavior-y is supported for axis-specific overscroll handling.
Element exposes onscrollend, the event that closes the loop on gesture-driven overscroll reveal.
CSS anchor-name is supported, the primitive overscroll gestures uses to anchor revealed elements to overscroll regions.
CSS position-anchor is supported, linking an absolutely-positioned element to its overscroll anchor.
